microsoft_ft: Scaled Azure's **compliance validation program** from a 2-person operation into a platformized system, standardizing enforcement workflows to sustain 45+ annual resilience drills and drive **$14M+ business impact** across enterprise partners including Databricks, Walmart, SAP, and NetApp.

Led **0→1 development** of an internal Resilience Automation Platform, defining self-service scheduling requirements that reduced operational toil by 30% and freed program capacity to support a growing portfolio of strategic accounts without added headcount.

Pioneered Azure's first proactive resilience testing capability, delivering a rack-level drill program in **4 months at 94% recovery rate**, surfacing critical hardware defects and establishing a repeatable compliance model for continuous platform validation.

Directed **14 cross-org recovery executions** under executive visibility, serving as primary liaison bridging Engineering, Legal, and Operations for a sovereign-cloud network isolation test tied to a $1.5B+ enterprise contract requiring rigorous audit documentation.

Built an internal **AI agent for drill planning**, restructuring compliance workflows to cut planning cycle time by 39% and increase program capacity by 21%, directly expanding the team's ability to support high-stakes partner escalations at scale.

Authored audit-ready technical documentation and post-execution case records for all 14 cross-org drills, establishing documentation standards that satisfied legal review requirements and served as the compliance record for enterprise contract obligations.
microsoft_2023: Championed **platform adoption** for AI-driven code generation workflows, conducting partner demos and enablement sessions that drove utilization across 14 key Azure service teams and eliminated **37 engineering hours** of monthly manual effort.

Shaped the product roadmap to include intent-based YAML generation by facilitating **11+ structured user interviews** with Azure service teams, surfacing critical workflow friction points and translating developer feedback into actionable feature requirements.

Improved documentation compliance and **retrieval accuracy by 83%** by enforcing rigorous metadata standards and migrating the team's knowledge base to an AI-powered semantic search tool, reducing case resolution time for internal support requests.
microsoft_2022: Generated **$3M in accelerated revenue** and launched Azure regions 28% faster by driving cross-functional alignment on a unified automation prioritization framework across 140+ teams, resolving competing stakeholder priorities through a structured decision process.

Identified **81 hours of manual toil per region launch** by conducting discovery interviews across 20+ service teams, then built a compliance-focused roadmap to automate critical workflow paths and reduce platform interruption risk during high-stakes deployments.

Enabled leadership to target automation gaps and prioritize **high-impact process improvements** by engineering a Power BI dashboard that tracked operational toil across 140+ teams, turning raw workflow data into an executive-ready compliance visibility tool.
amazon_robotics: Achieved **zero operational downtime** during a 2,000+ unit pilot transition by defining the legacy OS migration strategy, mapping dependencies across 1,200+ stations, and coordinating enforcement timelines with cross-functional IT and Operations stakeholders.

Facilitated Agile sprint planning and retrospectives to **resolve 40+ high-priority tickets**, stabilizing the developer intake process and ensuring engineering teams could execute against compliance milestones without platform interruption or backlog drift.

Drove strategic alignment across IT, Operations, and Engineering to implement **automated CI/CD pipelines**, accelerating the software deployment cycle by 25% and establishing a scalable delivery model for future platform compliance rollouts.
pro_painters: Increased **job bookings by 26%** by optimizing the end-to-end proposal lifecycle for 200+ monthly client accounts via a new CRM workflow, reducing friction in the partner intake process and improving response time for high-priority account escalations.

Reduced Customer Acquisition Cost by **13%** and lifted conversions by 2.7% by executing a digital-first go-to-market strategy, optimizing the website and Google profile to improve discoverability among target partner segments.

Strengthened leadership pricing decisions by conducting **profitability analysis across 1,000+ project records**, identifying and sealing margin leaks and delivering a data-backed framework for evaluating strategic account viability.
